description_long: This mobile phone features a sleek, modern design with a predominantly black front display accented by a striking green geometric pattern that radiates from the center, creating a visually dynamic effect. The back of the device is matte black with a prominent silver Apple logo centered in the upper half, and a triple camera array housed in a green module at the top left corner. The phone's edges are a vibrant green, providing a bold contrast to the black surfaces. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, with a smooth, glossy finish on the front and a matte texture on the back. The phone is thin and rectangular, with rounded corners and a flat profile. No external case or cover is present, and the physical buttons are not visible in these views.
description: A modern black and green mobile phone with a geometric patterned display, matte black back, and triple camera array in a green module.
description_view_0: Side view showing the phone's slim, flat profile and green edge, with no visible buttons or features.
description_view_1: Front and back view displaying the geometric green and black screen, matte black back with silver Apple logo, and triple camera array in a green module.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim green edge and flat profile, with no visible buttons.
description_view_3: Front and back view similar to view 1, showing the patterned display, matte black back, and green camera module.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, standing out against the matte black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vivid geometric pattern in green and black, with no visible icons, widgets, or notifications.
attribute_camera_placement: A triple camera array is located in the top left corner on the back, housed in a green square module with three circular lenses and a flash.
